MASTER CALENDAR JURY

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JESSE JONG, ESQ. of Harrison & Adeyanju, LLP, Tel No. 866-529-6155 appearing for Plaintiff Nathaniel Holmes;
Atty. DAVID L. BARCH, ESQ. of the Law Offices of Gregory V. DeBernard, Tel No. 925-977-1400 appearing telephonically for Defendant Joseph Dipasquale.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOSEPH DIPASQUALE'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied. The only evidence submitted in support of Defendant's motion is a declaration from Defendant's counsel who vaguely asserts that Defendant does not work or reside at the address where the purported substitute service occurred. (Declaration of David Lane, par. 4.) Defendant's counsel does not state facts establishing that he has personal knowledge about where Defendant works, nor does he state any specific facts to support this general assertion, i.e., where Defendant actually does work. Plaintiff's evidence sufficiently rebuts this vague assertion and establishes that Defendant works at the address where the substitute service occurred. (Declaration of Bryan Harrison, Exs. 1-6.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Sep-16-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
